title: peltopus ankylochele
intro: Peltopus ankylochele, also known as the "African Potato", is a type of plant that belongs to the Solanum genus and is native to South Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Peltopus ankylochele include its ability to relieve pain, reduce fever, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
